title: Keep weekly operating-window and billing reliability review active
summary: Adds a coordination-repo weekly ops review generator, fixture-driven validation, a scheduled workflow, and production-operations docs updates so billing reliability and 7-day operating-window evidence stay visible before gateway work.
completed_todo_items: Keep weekly operating-window evidence and billing reliability review in place while paid tenant count grows

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Validated through fixture mode by setting TOKVERA_WEEKLY_OPS_FIXTURE and writing markdown/json artifacts.
Confirms the new production-operations docs path builds and remains link-valid.

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the weekly-ops-review workflow, generator, fixture, docs references, and checklist completion if the review flow produces misleading or noisy alerts.
